title: SurprisingSweets
description: A simple Minecraft mod that adds some sweets!
body:
Surprising Sweets is a simple mod that adds a lot more uses to sugar _(I really felt it could use a few more)_.
This mod adds:
- Caramel and Caramel Apples
- Milk, White, and Dark Chocolate
- Cookies! (and cookie sandwiches)
- Brownies
- Lots of Rock Candies
- Gummies!

![Some foods in the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ce54042f48b7c3a6cdc01eed30f76bfe8a2b5d7.png)

All of which could be eaten!

![All the tools and armor in the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef8b56e6b3e9b82b00f1b7e419463bc39da7a9a2.png)

And, some armor and tools which could be made with caramel and rock candies! _(sadly, they cannot be eaten)_

![Special foods!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81be9201c4e7e82297129565585ee73f0fb40aa5.png)

Certain foods have special abilities! _(caramel apples, and rock candies)_

This is not made to be the most serious mod😅, just some more additions to make sugar better. _(also, who doesn't love sweets!)_
